members.failure_reason: realize failed: gold-consistency gate failed: cluster A: only 12% of active.value stems appear in history (threshold ≥50%); missing: ['changelog', 'continuous', 'feed', 'improvement', 'panel', 'recent', 'updat']; cluster C: user-role coverage of active value is 12% (history-wide 12%; threshold ≥50%). Active value is surfaced by assistant or third-party turns, not the user themselves; drift inference requires user-role agency.; cluster E: active value contains chunk(s) with zero history overlap: ['the recent-improvements panel']. The drift inference requires the user to surface the new attribute directly; assistant-only or other-session mentions don't establish user agency.
